{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221143028CA0F56E116D46A9C3CA"}"},"total":823},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7609291224563221272","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"以及一些序列的种类也很独特，队友也不是一味地雷同，我也很认同作者的看法。车队里就是不应该共享物资统一分配！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771738712,"group_id":"7547934527524457496","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101572429756375"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7547934527524457496","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"299"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10979,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":48835,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7609339265474167576","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"相比于这个系列的一些其他书籍算是比较出色的，怪物系统不是一味的雷同，有自己的特点，主角性格果决，遇到反派炮灰不废话，杀就完了，车队里没有拽的二五八万的女的，队长和主角有各自的优点又互相理解对方"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771738205,"group_id":"7547934527524457496","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw4PkRHVSlg0Z0oZQ6ivScA=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"101572429756375","user_name":"喜欢小天使的陈金山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101572429756375","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7547934527524457496","book_info":{"abstract":"【公路求生+诡异+序列+强化+罪犯序列+成神之路+斩妹达人+末日求生+迁徙路途】
世界虚影融合，诡异悄然降临。
人类赖以生存的成为诡异的天堂，一个个的城市化作死地。
迁徙寻找新的生存家园能成为了人类的目标。
序列超凡成为了人类的希望火种。
迁徙的路程中，林易掌握神秘系序列【强化】，觉醒序列【罪犯】，以罪犯序列踏上成神之路。
这条路上，各种序列也开始轮番登场。
神秘系序列【数据】、【时间】、【空间】、【幸运】、【知识】、【强化】……
职业系序列【罪犯】、【小偷】、【窥秘人】、【捉刀人】、【苦行僧】……
自然系序列【火焰使者】、【寒冰信奉】、【风之使徒】、【植物的眷顾者】……
各种序列都将拥有奇特的超凡能力，也将让序列超凡踏上成神之路。
想要解决这一切，唯有成神擦性。
活下去！
只有活下去才能有希望！
人类的火种终究不会熄灭，这片土地终将重新属于人类……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3d44a9b99118cadced58e46dfc770600","author":"网管续费","author_id":"","book_id":"7547934527524457496","book_name":"生存法则车队！","book_short_name":"车队求生：生存法则","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#585048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7547946777190613528","read_count":"55822","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1002711"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"452","tags":"科幻末世,末世,多女主,求生,囤物资,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/2186e9835aee261f773a7deea37ac1a7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779334982&x-signature=f5bryBczx%2BbPi7qM7Wt9DSgg9CQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1328660609237102","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"297"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221143028CA0F56E116D46A9C3CA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwa 几个旧世界重回的宏观设定我也比较喜欢，整体就是一直在路上，非常贴合公路求生。
幽默的同时，杀的也爽！
女主咬了一下四到现在，不错，没占太多剧情。
看他们写的公路求生到后面都成言情文了，没意思。
